name: Carrot Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 345°F.
2. Cream sugar and oil, then add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Add dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, cinnamon) and mix until just combined.
4. Stir in the grated carrots.
5. Pour batter into prepared muffin pans.
6. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
